info.name: Apache Unomi API Examples
info.description: Comprehensive collection of Apache Unomi REST API examples for getting started

request.description: Check the health status of Unomi server and its components (Karaf, ElasticSearch/OpenSearch, Unomi bundles, Persistence, Cluster)
Retrieve all tenants in the system. Requires administrator authentication.
Retrieve a specific tenant by ID
Create a new tenant. API keys (PUBLIC and PRIVATE) are automatically generated.
Update an existing tenant

query.description: Validity period in days (0 or null for no expiration)

request.description: Generate a new API key for a tenant. Type can be PUBLIC or PRIVATE.
Validate an API key for a tenant. Returns 200 OK if valid, 401 Unauthorized if invalid.
Delete a tenant
Retrieve all scopes in the system
Retrieve a specific scope by ID
Create a new scope. The itemId and metadata.id should match.
Create a scope with tags and additional metadata
Update an existing scope. Use POST with the same itemId to update.
Delete a scope by ID
Create a JSON schema for validating custom events. The schema name must match the eventType in events.
Get list of all installed JSON schema IDs
Retrieve a specific schema by its ID
Validate an event against its schema. Returns validation errors if any.
Delete a JSON schema by ID
Get basic context with minimal information. Creates profile and session if they don't exist.
Get context with source information about the page/site
Get context with all profile properties, session properties, segments, and scores
Get context with only specific profile and session properties
Create a simple segment based on a single profile property condition
Create a segment with multiple conditions using AND operator
Create a segment for users in a specific age range
Create a segment based on past events (users who performed an action in the last N days)
Create a complex segment combining multiple past event conditions
Create a segment that references another segment (nested segment condition)
List all segments with pagination
Get a specific segment by ID
Get the count of profiles matching a segment
Get profiles matching a segment
Delete a segment. Set validate=true to check for dependencies.
Send a context request with a view event to track page views
Send a context request with a custom event (requires schema to be created first)
Send multiple events using the event collector endpoint. This executes rules but doesn't return context.
Request personalization with matching-first strategy. Returns the first matching content or fallback.
Request personalization with score-sorted strategy. Contents are sorted by their filter scores.
Get metadata for all rules
Get a specific rule by ID
Create a rule that sets a profile property when an event occurs
Create a rule that adds a profile to a segment based on event conditions
Get statistics for all rules
Get statistics for a specific rule
Delete a rule
Get a profile by ID
Create or update a profile. Sends a profileUpdated event.
Search profiles using a condition query
Get total count of profiles
Get all segments that a profile belongs to
Get all sessions for a profile
Delete a profile

query.description: Enable detailed tracing of request processing

request.description: Get context with explain mode enabled. Returns detailed tracing information about rule execution, segment evaluation, and personalization. Requires administrator authentication.
Get list of all event type identifiers that the server has processed
Search for events using a query condition
Get events for a specific session, optionally filtered by event types
Get all available condition type definitions
Get all available action type definitions
Get all known property types organized by target

variable.description: Scope ID for scope management operations
API key to validate (used in Validate API Key request)
Private API key from tenant (used with tenantId for Basic Auth)
